---
title: "Clinical Trial Design and Analysis"
subtitle: "Track A — Biostatistics"
date: "2025-01-01"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
number-sections: true
---

# Clinical Trial Design and Analysis

**Track**: Track A — Biostatistics

The statistical science of designing and analyzing experiments on human subjects. Covers classical, adaptive, and Bayesian trial designs with regulatory context.

## Table of Contents

1. Fundamentals of Clinical Trial Design
2. Sample Size and Power
3. Group Sequential Designs
4. Adaptive Trial Designs
5. Bayesian Clinical Trial Designs
6. Multiplicity and Multiple Endpoints
7. Analysis of Specific Trial Types
8. Estimands and the ICH E9(R1) Framework

---

## Chapter 1: Fundamentals of Clinical Trial Design

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 2: Sample Size and Power

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 3: Group Sequential Designs

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 4: Adaptive Trial Designs

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 5: Bayesian Clinical Trial Designs

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 6: Multiplicity and Multiple Endpoints

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 7: Analysis of Specific Trial Types

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 8: Estimands and the ICH E9(R1) Framework

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*
